name: The Secrets of Honey Hills
overview: Honey Valley is a town on the seashore where the characters of the film live: the culinary genius of the hedgehog Marie, the provincial fashionista of the squirrel Lucy, the melancholic and kind bear cub Phil and others. However, the measured life of the characters is sometimes disturbed by strange and inexplicable events that lead to misunderstandings and even quarrels. The wise owl Sophie and her helper Chink the squirrel rush to help the neighbors. He takes photographs of events that occurred during the day for the brilliant detective, because Sophie is a night bird and sleeps during the daytime. At night, looking at Chink's photographs, the owl unravels the mysterious circumstances of the cases.

trailers.title: Премьера - Тайны медовой долины - детектив для детей - на PREMIER Союзмультфильм HD
